title: Fleet Transports Schema
description: Transport-only description of how to invoke each fleet CLI (agents.yaml). Never encodes tiers, levels, risk, confidence, or budget policy: that stays exclusively in .agents/config.yaml.levels and .agents/policies/routing.yaml (ADR 0010). additionalProperties:false on every object is the anti-drift guard: a tier/level/risk/confidence/budget field added here fails validation.

transports.description: Map of transport name (e.g. codex, agy, aider, claude) to its invocation contract.

binary.description: Executable name or path resolved on PATH (e.g. codex, agy, aider, claude).

argv_template.description: Ordered argv tokens, including placeholders such as {model_arg}, {worktree}, {out}, {prompt}, {files}. Rendered directly via exec, never through a shell.

input_channel.description: How the prompt payload reaches the CLI: piped to stdin, written to a file referenced by argv, or passed as a trailing argv token.

output_format.description: Shape of the CLI's stdout/output file: newline-delimited JSON events, a single JSON document, or unstructured text/prose.

default_s.description: Default wall-clock timeout in seconds for one dispatch on this transport.

sandbox.description: Sandbox/isolation flag value passed to the CLI (e.g. workspace-write). Optional: not every transport exposes a sandbox flag.

failure_signatures.description: Substrings/patterns identifying quota or auth failures in this transport's output, used to classify a dispatch outcome as reroute-worthy rather than a generic error.

quota_class.description: Fact of the underlying account, not a judgment: subscription (fixed-cap account, no per-call billing) or api (billed per call).

models.description: Canonical model name (provider/model, optionally with a provisional effort suffix) to this transport's invocation details.

contract_test.description: Path to this transport's structural contract test (verifies the binary and the argv flags this adapter depends on still exist).

active.description: Whether config.yaml.levels may route to this transport in v1. false means declared-but-inactive (e.g. claude in v1).

model_arg.description: Exact string this transport's CLI expects for --model/-m (or equivalent).

reasoning_effort.description: Provisional effort suffix decomposed from the canonical model name, passed to the CLI's own effort flag.

effort_whitelist.description: Per-model whitelist of accepted reasoning_effort values, validated against the backend's real constraints, never a single global enum.

modelSubscription.$comment: max_cost_per_call_usd is forbidden here: subscription accounts have no per-call billing (ADR 0010 section 4).

model_arg.description: Exact string this transport's CLI expects for --model/-m (or equivalent).

reasoning_effort.description: Provisional effort suffix decomposed from the canonical model name, passed to the CLI's own effort flag.

effort_whitelist.description: Per-model whitelist of accepted reasoning_effort values, validated against the backend's real constraints, never a single global enum.

max_cost_per_call_usd.description: Per-call cost ceiling. Only meaningful for quota_class:api transports (ADR 0010 section 4).
